name: Ibuprofen
description: A non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) used to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and lower fever. Commonly prescribed for headaches, muscle pain, arthritis, menstrual cramps, and mild to moderate acute pain.

name: Magnesium Glycinate
description: A highly bioavailable form of magnesium used to relieve muscle cramps, tension headaches, improve sleep quality, and reduce anxiety. Particularly useful for people with magnesium deficiency causing physical symptoms like restless legs and nighttime cramping.

name: Turmeric (Curcumin)
description: A natural anti-inflammatory compound derived from turmeric root. Curcumin has demonstrated effectiveness in reducing joint pain, inflammation, and stiffness, especially in osteoarthritis and rheumatoid arthritis. Best absorbed when combined with black pepper (piperine).

name: Topical Diclofenac Gel
description: A topical NSAID applied directly to the skin over painful joints or muscles. Provides localised pain relief with fewer gastrointestinal side effects than oral NSAIDs. Used for osteoarthritis, muscle strains, and tendon injuries.

name: Omega-3 Fish Oil
description: Rich in EPA and DHA fatty acids, omega-3 supplements reduce systemic inflammation, support joint health, lower triglycerides, and have documented benefits for reducing chronic pain and morning stiffness in inflammatory conditions.

name: Aconitum napellus
description: Acute remedy for sudden, intense fear and panic that comes on after a fright or shock. Marked restlessness, palpitations, and a conviction that death is near. Symptoms appear violently and are worse around night-time.

keynotes.worse_from: night-time, bad news, being alone, fright
keynotes.fears: fear of death, fear of losing control
keynotes.sleep: no sleep, fear at night, nightmares

name: Arsenicum album
description: For intense anxiety about health and death with restlessness, exhaustion, and a need for order. The person is fastidious, fears being alone, and feels better with company, warmth, and reassurance. Anxiety is typically worse after midnight.

keynotes.fears: fear of illness, fear of death, fear of losing control
keynotes.sleep: broken sleep, waking at fixed hours, fear at night
keynotes.food: craves warm drinks, aversion to food, nausea from smell

name: Ignatia amara
description: The leading remedy for acute grief, loss, and disappointed love. Marked by sighing, sobbing, a lump in the throat, and contradictory, changeable moods. The person tends to suppress emotion and hold grief silently.

keynotes.fears: self-blame, guilt, fear of being abandoned
keynotes.sleep: cannot fall asleep because thoughts race, sleep worse after worry, sleeps better after crying
keynotes.food: aversion to food, loss of appetite

name: Natrum muriaticum
description: For long-held, silent grief and disappointment. The person closes off, dwells on past hurts, weeps when alone, and strongly dislikes consolation, which makes them worse. Often reserved, responsible, and craving salt.

keynotes.better_from: being left alone, open air, crying
keynotes.fears: fear of being abandoned, fear of criticism, self-blame
keynotes.sleep: broken sleep, sleep worse after worry, sleeps better after crying
keynotes.triggers: after grief, breakup, betrayal, humiliation, chronic family pressure

name: Pulsatilla nigricans
description: For the mild, tearful, affectionate person who weeps easily and craves comfort and reassurance. Moods are changeable, the person feels worse alone and in warm stuffy rooms, and is markedly better in open air and with consolation.

keynotes.fears: fear of being abandoned, fear of dark
keynotes.sleep: cannot fall asleep, fear at night, sleeps better after crying
keynotes.food: aversion to fried food, craves sweets

name: Staphysagria
description: For the effects of suppressed anger, humiliation, and indignation. The person swallows insults, holds resentment, and may later erupt or fall ill from the stored emotion. Sensitive to criticism and disrespect.

keynotes.behavior: silent and closed, weeping, then impulsive
keynotes.fears: revenge thoughts, self-blame, fear of criticism
keynotes.sleep: sleep worse after worry, broken sleep
keynotes.triggers: insult, betrayal, humiliation, suppression of anger

name: Lycopodium clavatum
description: For anticipatory anxiety and lack of self-confidence hidden behind a domineering exterior. Fears failure and responsibility, dreads new tasks yet performs once started. Often cowardly at home but authoritative outside; craves sweets and warm food.

keynotes.fears: fear of failure, fear of responsibility, fear of criticism
keynotes.sleep: cannot fall asleep because thoughts race, wakes unrefreshed
keynotes.food: craves sweets, warm food, empty stomach aggravation
keynotes.triggers: school failure, business loss, prolonged overwork

name: Aurum metallicum
description: For deep depression and hopelessness following failure or loss of self-worth, often with thoughts of death or suicide. The person is serious, responsible, and feels they have failed in duty. Worse at night, better with music.

keynotes.sleep: no sleep, broken sleep, sleep worse after worry
keynotes.food: loss of appetite, aversion to food
keynotes.triggers: business loss, school failure, humiliation, prolonged overwork

name: Nux vomica
description: For the driven, irritable, impatient person worn out by overwork, ambition, and stimulants. Easily angered, fault-finding, and oversensitive to noise and contradiction. Often linked to substance use, coffee, and sedentary stress.

keynotes.sleep: wakes at fixed hours, wakes unrefreshed, broken sleep
keynotes.food: craves spicy food, coffee, fried food; overeating when stressed
keynotes.triggers: prolonged overwork, suppression of anger, substance use

name: Gelsemium sempervirens
description: For anticipatory fear and anxiety with trembling, weakness, and a desire to be left alone. Dread before exams, performances, or ordeals, with a wish to flee. Cowardly, drowsy, and dull rather than agitated.

keynotes.better_from: being left alone, motion, open air
keynotes.fears: fear of failure, fear of losing control, fear of responsibility
keynotes.sleep: cannot fall asleep because thoughts race, wakes unrefreshed

name: Phosphorus
description: For the open, affectionate, impressionable person full of fears who craves company and reassurance. Fears being alone, the dark, and illness; startles easily and is highly sympathetic. Desires cold drinks and refreshing foods.

keynotes.worse_from: being alone, night-time, bad news, crowds
keynotes.fears: fear of dark, fear of being abandoned, fear of illness
keynotes.sleep: fear at night, nightmares, broken sleep
keynotes.food: craves cold drinks, salt, ice cream

name: Sepia officinalis
description: For emotional indifference and exhaustion, often after childbirth or prolonged family demands. The person feels detached even from loved ones, irritable, and wants to be alone; markedly better from vigorous motion and dancing.

keynotes.food: aversion to food, craves sour, empty stomach aggravation
keynotes.triggers: childbirth, marriage stress, chronic family pressure, prolonged overwork

name: Stramonium
description: For intense terror, especially fear of the dark and of being alone, with violent or frantic behaviour. May have hallucinations, nightmares, and a desire for light and company. For acute fright with extreme agitation.

keynotes.fears: fear of dark, fear of death, fear of losing control
keynotes.sleep: no sleep, fear at night, nightmares
keynotes.red_flags: hallucinations, violence, extreme agitation, disconnection from reality

name: Berberine
description: A natural alkaloid with potent glucose-lowering effects comparable to metformin. Used for type 2 diabetes management, metabolic syndrome, high cholesterol, and PCOS. Also shows anti-inflammatory and gut microbiome-modulating properties.

name: Coenzyme Q10 (CoQ10)
description: A powerful antioxidant naturally produced by the body that declines with age and statin use. Supports mitochondrial energy production, reduces oxidative stress, improves heart health, lowers blood pressure, and alleviates fatigue in chronic conditions.

name: Metformin
description: The first-line oral medication for type 2 diabetes. Reduces liver glucose production, improves insulin sensitivity, and lowers blood sugar. Also shown to have anti-ageing properties and reduce cardiovascular risk. Requires a prescription.

name: Vitamin D3 + K2
description: Combined supplementation of vitamin D3 and K2 supports bone density, immune function, cardiovascular health, and mood regulation. Vitamin K2 ensures calcium is directed to bones rather than arteries. Especially important for people with limited sun exposure.

name: Psyllium Husk
description: A soluble fibre supplement that lowers LDL cholesterol, improves blood sugar control, promotes healthy bowel movements, and supports weight management by increasing satiety. Used for IBS, constipation, type 2 diabetes, and high cholesterol.

name: Lisinopril
description: An ACE inhibitor used to treat high blood pressure (hypertension) and heart failure. Reduces cardiovascular risk, protects kidneys in diabetic patients, and lowers mortality after heart attacks. Available by prescription only.

name: Probiotics (Lactobacillus & Bifidobacterium blend)
description: A multi-strain probiotic supplement that restores gut microbiome balance, reduces symptoms of IBS, bloating, and diarrhoea. Also shown to improve mood (gut-brain axis), reduce inflammation, and support immune function in people with chronic lifestyle conditions.
